verdict: Great rhythmic flow and synchronization, but ruined by several unplayable or overly complex 3-panel hold-and-tap patterns inappropriate for a Medium chart.

issues.problem: Simultaneous R and U holds with a D tap at 26.247 creates an awkward 3-panel bracket setup, which is too complex for a Medium chart.
Holding D and R while tapping L at 29.940 requires holding two arrows and tapping a third, forcing an unnatural heel-toe or hand press.
Another 3-panel hold-and-tap (holding R+U, tapping D) that violates standard play conventions for this difficulty level.
A UR jump occurs while the D hold is still active, creating an unplayable 3-panel combination on a standard pad.
